paragraphs.text: 今天妈妈教我做家务。我先学扫地，把地上的灰尘和纸屑扫干净。
paragraphs.translation: Today Mom taught me to do housework. First I learned to sweep the floor, cleaning up the dust and scraps of paper.

paragraphs.text: 然后我学擦桌子。我用一块湿抹布把桌子擦得亮亮的。妈妈夸我真能干。
paragraphs.translation: Then I learned to wipe the table. I used a wet cloth to make the table shiny. Mom praised me for being so capable.

paragraphs.text: 做家务虽然有点累，但是看到家里变得整洁，我很开心。以后我要多帮妈妈做家务。
paragraphs.translation: Although doing housework is a bit tiring, I'm happy to see the house become tidy. From now on I'll help Mom more with the chores.
